text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't believe I'm failing five subjects!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Now I've got three hours of extra classes every
day...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Things are looking desperate! Not only will I have
to stop being an Umadol, but I might even get
held back!

Smart Falcon's cry for help really hits home, but
unfortunately, there's nothing I can do...
